author: Neurocoda
description: Recommend semantically related notes from local metadata and insert curated links into your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Semantic Linker

name: Semantic Linker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed
- Fixed the Semantic Linker graph showing “Open a note to see related notes” after focus moves to Obsidian’s Graph View or another pane while a Markdown note is still open.
- Updated the graph settings button to open an in-graph settings panel instead of the global plugin settings.
- Node hover titles now show the full note title instead of a truncated version.

### Improved
- Added separate visibility toggles for linked notes and recommendation nodes.
- Refined the graph settings panel layout and interactions to better match Obsidian’s native Graph View behavior.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Semantic Linker 0.1.0

Initial community release.

### Features

- Recommend semantically related notes from local metadata.
- Show recommendations in an Obsidian-style local graph.
- Insert links into a configurable Links section.
- Support Ollama Native and OpenAI-compatible embedding providers.
- Support configurable link templates, URL strategies, ranking weights, and graph display options.
- Keep feedback-aware ranking disabled by default.
